lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Hey, [player name]. Got any abyssal pearls you want to trade?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's see what you have.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: I have my general store, but I also have a small collection of lanterns available, if that interests you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lanterns, you say?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Yes, powerful artefacts of The Abyss. We have accumulated a small collection of them from all of the fighting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do the wizards not use them in the fight against the abyss?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Absolutely not. We know how powerful they are, yet their magic is too unknown to us to risk using.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have one to aid in the fight?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't just give you one. We're under strict instructions to only provide lanterns to people who prove themselves as committed to the cause.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How committed does one have to be?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: If you've fought the abyss enough to amass 1,500 abyssal pearls, that would be enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I don't have enough on me right now.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: That's alright. Feel free to come back when you have more pearls on you.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: As long as you are aware of how powerful they are, and that I can trust you won't lost it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that rift guardian doing over there?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: They're great, aren't they? I don't know their name, if they even have one, so I just call them Rifty.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: That rift they have is a folded-space storage rift, just like the ones Traiborn uses! Small on the outside, but big on the inside!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But what's the rift for?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: The guardians use it to store things. If you help hold back the Abyss, they'll let you take things from the rift in return.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Anyway, did you want to trade?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you selling things here?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Sedridor told us to make sure there was plenty of incentive for people to help us. He also wants us to gather abyssal pearls for research purposes. I thought this would be a good way of doing both!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you sell things in exchange for abyssal pearls?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Exactly! I've got some interesting things from the Wizards' Tower, along with some cool stuff the Guardians of the Rift gave us. Want to take a look?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me more about this place.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Well, I only really know what the Great Guardian told us. This is the Temple of the Eye, or at least, what's left of it. It was built long ago to house the Eye, a powerful Saradominist artefact.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Apparently, servants of some 'Fallen Empire' desired this artefact. However, in their attempt to steal it, they accidently opened a rift into a deadly area of the Abyss called the Scar.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Were it not for the Justiciar of the Lion, the rift would have endangered all of Gielinor. She used the Eye to close it and then created the Guardians of the Rift to protect this temple.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Of course, the rift is open again now, but with our help, the Guardians of the Rift are keeping it under control.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Anyway, did you want to trade?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this dye in the rewards rift...

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: And you want me to change it to a different one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, yes, but how did you know?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: You'd be surprised at how often this happens. Lots of adventurers have been pulling bottles of dye out of that rift, only to wish they'd got a different one. I've ended up with plenty of spares.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: So on that note, would you like me to swap your dye for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to swap my abyssal red dye for some abyssal green dye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Any time, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to swap my abyssal red dye for some abyssal blue dye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to swap my abyssal green dye for some abyssal red dye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to swap my abyssal green dye for some abyssal blue dye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to swap my abyssal blue dye for some abyssal red dye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to swap my abyssal blue dye for some abyssal green dye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Not a problem. Feel free to come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'd like to sell it to you.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Oh? Usually I trade them for other dyes, I suppose I could buy one from you instead for my own research.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Which dye did you want to sell?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost an item from the rewards rift.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: What was the item?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A locket.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: It's funny you should mention that. I actually found an old locket while rummaging through the rift myself.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: I'd happily give it to you, but you don't have space for it. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A bag.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: It's funny you should mention that. I actually found a bag with strange markings on it while rummaging through the rift myself.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: I'd happily give it to you, but you don't have space for it. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Felix!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, it doesn't matter.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to sell you something from the rewards rift.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Oh? Usually I sell items to you adventurers. What did you have in mind?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: An abyssal green dye? I can offer you 50 abyssal pearls for that.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Come back if you have any more items from the rift to sell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I'll keep it for myself.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Very well, come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: An abyssal blue dye? I can offer you 50 abyssal pearls for that.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Come back if you have any more items from the rift to sell.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: An abyssal red dye? I can offer you 50 abyssal pearls for that.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Come back if you have any more items from the rift to sell.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: An abyssal lantern? I can offer you 100 abyssal pearls for that.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Come back if you have any more items from the rift to sell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I'll keep it for myself.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Very well, come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Alright. See you later.

sections.title: Using an abyssal dye on Felix

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this dye in the rewards rift...

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: And you want me to change it to a different one?

sections.title: After Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: Hey, [player name]. I heard about Persten. I can't believe it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know, Felix. I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: I wish I could have met her... The real her I mean. I bet she'd have known how to properly close this rift.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Felix
lines.text: I guess it's just down to us though. Speaking of which, back to work I guess. Did you have any abyssal pearls you wanted to trade?
